subject: [PATCH] hrtimers: skip cpu_base->lock in hrtimer_get_next_event() when hres_active

reviews.author: tip-bot2 for Usama Arif
reviews.summary: The commit was merged into the timers/core branch of tip with minor changes to the changelog and comments. The patch itself remains unchanged.

2026-07-07.patch_summary: This patch optimizes the hrtimer_get_next_event() function by skipping the cpu_base->lock acquisition when high resolution timers are active. The lock is not required because the hres_active flag is only written by the local CPU and all callers reach this point with interrupts disabled on the same CPU.
